text:
What are the options to get to obtain the document? I mean, I'm on telegram on my phone.
I'm away from the main unit. So the idea is for you to resolve this issue.
Everything is set up so I can get this information, but we're having problems with attachments.
So give me an alternate way or figure out a way to send me the document. It's vital.
ai_summary: Request for alternative method to receive a vital document via Telegram on phone.
